revoked.title: API Key Revoked
revoked.message: The current key was rejected. Remove it and add a <limited>limited</limited> or <extended>extended</extended> key.

required.title: API Key Required
required.message: Add a <limited>limited</limited> or <extended>extended</extended> key to unlock authenticated features.

levels.description: An <extended>extended</extended> key gives full access; a <limited>limited</limited> key covers most features. Public keys are not supported.

features.coreTools: Core tools (Base, Flight, Research, Profitability, etc.)

sharing.title: Sharing preferences

help.label: Sharing preferences help
help.tooltip: Choose who can see your data.

sharing.intro: You can share information about your company with other users and control who can see what.

developerAccess.label: Let the developer use my API key for testing, debugging and improvements
developerAccess.description: Your API key can be used to fetch your company data for bug fixes, feature testing and working on updates.
developerAccess.confirm:
Enable developer access?

This lets the developer use your API key to fetch your company data for testing, debugging and working on improvements. It is separate from your sharing preferences and does not expose your data to other users.

bases.title: Bases
bases.basesOverheadSummarySuffix: consumables totals + admin center level only; used by guild Admin Center ROI

productionChains.title: Production Chains
productionChains.guildChainsSuffix: lets your guild use your research, perks & workforce to price your chain signups fairly; defaults to Guild

help.label: Privacy & storage help
help.tooltip: How keys are stored and used.

storageDuration.label: Data storage duration
storageDuration.text: Cached responses and decrypted data are purged within 48 hours. Encrypted API keys are stored longer to allow sharing of information with others.

dataSharing.label: Data sharing
dataSharing.text: Stored keys remain private to this service; only the site owners have access to them.

purpose.label: Purpose
purpose.text: Keys are used strictly to proxy authenticated Game API requests and persist essential cache entries.

keyStorage.label: Key storage
keyStorage.text: Encrypted at rest and only decrypted in-memory while making outbound Game API calls.

accessLevel.label: Access Level
accessLevel.text: Extended access keys unlock every dashboard (including guild donations); limited keys cover most planning tools and are used for sharing with others.

sync.label: Cross-device sync
sync.description: Syncs all saved settings and data, including favorites, profitability overrides, recipe chains, saved base plans, snapshots, ship blueprints, etc. Enabling this setting for the first time might discard saved information on other devices.

donation.label: Donation button
donation.description: Toggle the Buy me a coffee button visibility.

statTiles.label: Stat tiles
statTiles.toggle: Show stat tiles in the top bar and menu
statTiles.description: Toggle the rank, prestige and company value tiles.

debug.label: Debug info
debug.description: Enables extra debug tables and breakdowns throughout the app.

customPrices.title: Custom Prices
customPrices.syncToggle: Use the same custom prices on every page
customPrices.syncDescription: Turn this off to manage independent price overrides for each page. When disabled, every page remembers its own custom values.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.syncDescription: When enabled, material favorites can auto-favorite matching recipes and unfavoriting recipes can clear the material.

productionSettings.title: Production Settings
productionSettings.syncToggle: Use the same production settings on every page
productionSettings.syncDescription: When enabled, research overrides and overhead previews stay in sync between Base and Profitability.

startingBase.label: Starting base
startingBase.description: Used to hide the starting-planet terraform warning on other bases. Enable the checkbox if the original starting base no longer exists.

starterPlanning.label: Starter base planning
starterPlanning.toggle: Show starter base option when planning a new base
starterPlanning.description: Adds a control in the Warnings & info panel to simulate construction costs as a starter base (12 free terraform slots, 3 star slots).

wishlistDefault.label: Wishlist default
wishlistDefault.toggle: Default to base wishlist when creating from preview
wishlistDefault.description: When enabled, the wishlist builder opened from the upgrade preview defaults to the base's own wishlist instead of creating a new one.

warehouseTarget.label: Warehouse target supply
warehouseTarget.description: Days of supply the “W” hotkey sizes base warehouses to.

help.label: Profitability colors help
help.tooltip: Customize profit color thresholds for recipe cards.

help.label: API call log help
help.tooltip: Recent requests made by this browser session.
